headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Nasdaq (NDAQ) FinTech Momentum, Capital Returns, And New Trading Approvals
summary: In April 2026, Nasdaq, Inc. reported first-quarter revenue of US$1,407 million and net income of US$519 million, alongside declaring a regular quarterly dividend of US$0.31 per share payable in June and completing a multi-year share repurchase program totaling 48,547,848 shares for US$4,613.07 million. The combination of double-digit year-on-year growth in revenue and earnings per share, record momentum in its Financial Technology division, and regulatory approvals for extended 23/5 trading...
